description: High-level charter establishing the GTA project scope, objectives, governance structure, initial milestones, assumed constraints, and approval regime to authorize and guide the initial planning phase.
steps_to_create: Define project purpose, objectives, and success criteria
Outline high-level scope boundaries and in-scope vs out-of-scope elements
Identify governance roles, decision rights, and escalation paths
Set initial milestones, constraints (budget, regulatory), and dependencies
Draft risk and assumption registers to be reviewed
Obtain formal approvals from Studio Head, Executive Producer, and Publisher Liaison
approval_authorities: Studio Head; Executive Producer; Publisher Liaison

description: Initial collection of top risks across technical, financial, regulatory, operational, and reputational domains with high-level mitigations and owners to inform early risk governance.
steps_to_create: Catalog identified risks from project brief and scoping
Assess likelihood and impact; assign risk priority
Assign owners and high-level mitigations for top risks
Define monitoring cadence and risk review meetings
Link risks to overarching governance (Steering Committee)

description: High-level plan detailing how and when information will be shared with key stakeholders (publisher, partners, regulators, employees, and players) including channels, cadence, and escalation
steps_to_create: Identify stakeholder groups and information needs
Define communication channels (meetings, newsletters, dashboards, press), cadence, and ownership
Set approval workflows for external communications
Establish escalation paths for risk and crisis communication
Link plan to governance and milestones

description: Plan to identify, categorize, and engage stakeholders (publishers, strategic partners, regulatory bodies, players) with defined engagement activities, feedback loops, and decision-making processes
steps_to_create: Map stakeholder list and assess influence/interest
Define engagement activities, forums, and cadence
Align engagement activities with governance gates
Establish feedback loops and decision rights for stakeholder input
Obtain approvals for engagement strategy from Steering Committee

description: Overview of the program budget, funding sources, and governance for approvals, including allocations for development, tooling, hardware, and risk contingencies
steps_to_create: Outline major cost categories (R&D, tools, hardware, QA, marketing)
Identify funding sources (publisher investments, government grants, partnerships)
Sketch high-level cash flow and funding milestones
Assign ownership for budget controls and change approvals
Define contingency and risk-adjusted reserves

description: Framework to monitor project progress, quality, risks, regulatory compliance, and stakeholder feedback with core KPIs, data sources, and reporting cadence
steps_to_create: Define strategic and operational KPIs across scope, schedule, budget, quality, risk, compliance, and user engagement
Identify data sources, owners, and collection methods
Set reporting cadence and governance/approval flow
Link metrics to decision points and governance gates
